name: SmartTubeIOS
desc: Native Swift/SwiftUI YouTube client for iPhone, iPad, Apple TV & Mac — ad-free, SponsorBlock, DeArrow, Google sign-in, up to 8K. Open source.
descFull: Native Swift/SwiftUI YouTube client for iPhone, iPad, Apple TV & Mac — ad-free, SponsorBlock, DeArrow, Google sign-in, up to 8K. Open source.
